name: ecu-test-api
description: Codex skills for ecu.test API work with bundled 2024.3 and 2026.1 references.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for ecu.test COM, REST, Object, Tools, Report and internal APIs.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local plugin that packages the existing ecu.test API skills as separate, routeable Codex skills. Each skill keeps its own bundled versioned references and task-specific guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use ecu.test Object API to inspect a package.
Migrate an ecu.test Tools API script to 2026.1.
Find the correct ecu.test Report API object model.
